mapper.delete: DELETE FROM service_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND service_id = #{serviceId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND service_id = #{serviceId}

SELECT sf.id, sf.user_id, sf.service_id, sf.create_time, s.name as service_name, s.image as service_image, s.description as service_description, s.price as service_price, s.duration as service_duration FROM service_favorite sf INNER JOIN service_item s ON sf.service_id = s.id WHERE sf.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY sf.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_favorite sf INNER JOIN service_item s ON sf.service_id = s.id WHERE sf.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 1
